action.reasoning: Observation: The training script continues to crash with exit code 139 (segmentation fault). I've identified the main issues: 1) There's a mismatch between the class name in model.py (SimpleSpatioTemporalGCN) and what train.py is trying to import (SpatioTemporalGCN). 2) The model architecture is overly complex with incorrect reshaping operations. 3) The forward method has logical errors in how it processes the data. I need to fix the class name mismatch and create a much simpler model that correctly handles the spatiotemporal data.
